title: taraxacum ottonis
intro: Taraxacum ottonis, also known as the Othon's dandelion or Othon's hawkbit, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus that is native to the mountainous regions of Central and Eastern Europe. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum ottonis include its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, such as constipation and indigestion, as well as its ability to help lower blood pressure and improve overall liver function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
